Review · pr · Thorough · sample-form

**Depth:** Thorough

Using code-review for a client-only UI/form diff. This stays Thorough because the scope is local UI state handling and does not touch auth, persistence, migrations, or cross-service contracts.

## Findings
No merge-blocking findings found.

## Review synthesis
The review remained at Thorough depth and did not escalate.
